reports.title: Athlete Performance Report
reports.description: Comprehensive individual performance metrics across speed, agility, endurance and power outputs.

reports.title: Recovery & Readiness Report
reports.description: HRV, sleep quality, hydration and fatigue index analysis with readiness predictions.

reports.title: Biomechanics Analysis Report
reports.description: Running mechanics, movement symmetry, jump technique and mobility assessment.

reports.title: Training Load Report
reports.description: Acute-to-chronic workload ratio, session intensity distribution and load progression.

reports.title: Team Performance Report
reports.description: Squad-wide performance overview including readiness scores, injury map and top performers.

reports.title: Match Performance Report
reports.description: GPS-based match analytics with speed zones, heat maps, work rate and positional benchmarks.
